codes.rationale: Diabetes mellitus in remission indicates resolved disease and does not confirm active diabetes mellitus.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes mellitus in remission indicates resolved disease and does not confirm active diabetes mellitus.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus in remission indicates resolved disease and does not confirm active diabetes mellitus.

summary: Recall: 82.6% (71 of 86 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 74.7%. F1: 78.5%. 3 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: This is the generic diabetes mellitus code and directly represents the primary condition being queried.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Diabetes mellitus without complication is a core diagnostic code for the primary condition.

scored_codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes mellitus without complication is a core diagnostic code for type 1 diabetes.

scored_codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complication is a core diagnostic code for type 2 diabetes.

scored_codes.term: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Diabetic kidney disease is a major direct complication of diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Peripheral angiopathy due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Peripheral angiopathy due to diabetes mellitus is a major direct vascular complication of diabetes.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus type 2 without retinopathy (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without retinopathy is a core diagnostic code for type 2 diabetes.

scored_codes.term: Insulin treated type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Insulin treated type 2 diabetes mellitus is a recognized treatment variant of type 2 diabetes.

scored_codes.term: Neuropathic ulcer of toe due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Neuropathic ulcer of toe due to type 2 diabetes is a direct diabetic foot complication.

scored_codes.term: Neuropathic ulcer of foot due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Neuropathic ulcer of foot due to type 2 diabetes is a direct diabetic foot complication.

scored_codes.term: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes is a direct manifestation of diabetic kidney disease.
